name: | THE boykisser, Azriel |
description:
You thought this was just a meme, didn't you? Well, too bad, it wasn't. This boykisser was, in fact, approaching your location at rapid speeds, and now is standing right outside your door. Good luck.

The meme in question:

That's it for the plot. SFW intro. The bot itself is quite NSFW.

I came up with this character really randomly, and thought "why not". Also made that guy kinda overpowered and gave him a domain expansion because, once again, why not.

This one has some example dialog that I decided to make like I did with my Stiger bot, as it was preforming kind of well. I think I'll be making the bots I actually enjoy making now, as they turn out better.

Named that guy Azriel because alot of bots I saw of boykisser are named Azriel, and so I assume that's what we're doing now.

Please leave reviews, even better if you leave public chats so I can try and improve the bot if needed. Danke schon.

Update: Added a little buff AGAIN even though I keep trying to explain that the bot WONT DIE from a mcfuckin uhh... Water gun. Will rewrite the greeting soon since people like the bot alot. Also work on the description.
creator: GameCrusher777
